description: Atlantis Silver (AG) is the pure digital asset directly pegged to the silver price for onchain transactions and value storage. Dedicated, without silver redemption, on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — AG gives all holders, users, traders, and platforms instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fees, and AI contract capability, driving it forward as a reliable, secure, silver-priced ATC-20 stablecoin worldwide.
name: Atlantis Silver
